name: Penalty Panic
description: Slide the keeper to catch falling footballs in a fast canvas arcade game.
features: Canvas game loop with a keeper sprite moved by keyboard AND on-screen touch buttons
Footballs fall at increasing speed; catching scores, missing ends the round
Live score HUD with a pop animation on each catch
All-time saves leaderboard on game over with the player's row highlighted

storage.meaning: the player's personal best round score

ui.layout: full-bleed canvas stage with a HUD overlay

acceptance: The keeper moves via arrow keys and via on-screen ◀ ▶ buttons
Catching a football increments the score; a miss ends the round
On game over the score is added to the saves counter and top(10) is shown
All per-frame state lives in a ref; setState is only called on score/game-over events
